data.biography:
Nathaniel Wales Faxon is an American actor, comedian, director, and Academy Award-winning screenwriter. He won the Academy Award for Best Adapted Screenplay for co-writing The Descendants (2011) and starred in the FOX comedy series Ben and Kate (2012–2013), the FX comedy series Married  2014–2015) and voices Elfo in the Netflix adult animated television series Disenchantment  (2018-).

He is an alumnus of the Los Angeles-based improvisational and sketch comedy troupe The Groundlings, where he began performing in 2001.

He's best known for his appearances in comedic films such as Orange County (2002), Walk Hard: The Dewey Cox Story (2007), Bad Teacher (2011), Zookeeper (2011), Tammy (2014), Sex Tape (2014), Life of the Party (2018), Father of the Year (2018), and several Broken Lizard films including Beerfest (2006). He also appeared in Charlie's Angels (2019).

He co-starred in Darren Star's semi-autobiographical satire Grosse Pointe and had recurring roles in several television series such as The Cleveland Show, Joey, Up All Night and Reno 911!.

He has been featured in a series of prominent Holiday Inn commercials featuring Joe Buck as well as an ad by Blockbuster. However, he did not get a significant lead role until 2012 when he starred as the titular Ben in Ben and Kate.

He starred alongside Judy Greer in the FX comedy series Married (2014), which ran for two seasons. He's had major recurring roles as Jeremy de Longpre on the series Allen Gregory, Nick on Netflix's Friends from College, The Swede on Our Flag Means Death, Arthur on Loot, and Marshall on the series A League of Their Own. He's also had a recurring role as Neville, Jackie's love interest, on The Conners.

He provides the voice for Captain Underpants and Mr. Krupp in The Epic Tales of Captain Underpants as well as the Captain Underpants specials. He also provides the voice for Chief on the series Housebroken.

He co-wrote and co-directed The Way, Way Back (2013) and Downhill (2020) with writing partner Jim Rash.
data.name: Nat Faxon

data.biography:
Євгеній Олегович Ламах — український актор театру та кіно. Номінант премії критиків «Кіноколо» 2019 року.

Народився 29 червня 1996 року у місті Лебедин. Дитинство та юність провів у місті Суми.

Навчаючись в початковій школі «Журавушка», займався у театральному гуртку. Тут він й отримав перший акторський досвід — у музичній виставі «Король Дроздоборід». Пізніше навчався у Сумській гімназії № 1, у класі з гуманітарним ухилом. Саме завдяки класному керівнику — Лідії Михайлюк, — яка викладала світову літературу, учні не тільки багато читали, а й намагались театралізовувати ти чи інші твори. У шкільні роки Євген займався у Театрі-студії «Город С» (художній керівник Наталя Черкасенко).

Після школи вступив до Київського національного університету культури і мистецтв, закінчив театральну кафедру, майстерня Володимира Нечипоренка.

У 2016 році, навчаючись на 3 курсі КНУКіМ, дебютував як кіноактор — у т/с «Команда», режисер Кирил Капица.

У 2017 році, за версією сайту ZN.UA, Євген Ламах був названий одним з найперспективніших молодих акторів Українського кіно.
data.name: Євгеній Ламах

data.biography: Aisha Ahmed was born on May 8, 1996 in Mumbai, Maharashtra, India. She is an actress and producer, known for Lock'd IN (2021), Minus One: New Chapter (2019) and Balcony Buddies (2021).
data.name: Aisha Ahmed

data.biography: He Landou (何蓝逗) is a Chinese actress born on October 16, 1999, in Huizhou City, Guangdong Province. She began her acting career in 2015 after being discovered during her high school years. Known for her versatility, He Landou has appeared in various dramas and films, including Moonshine and Valentine, My Best Summer, and Star-Crossed Lovers. She has also played leading roles in productions like My Dearest and Spring of Life. Her performances have earned her recognition and popularity in the Chinese entertainment industry.
data.name: He Landou

data.biography: 何蓝逗，本名何蓝，1999年10月16日生于广东省，中国内地女演员 。2015年，主演青春喜剧片《青春喂了狗》，从此开始演艺事业 。2016年1月，在爱情剧《翡翠恋人》中饰演逗逗 ；4月，出演喜剧片《绝世高手》；12月，在冒险悬疑片《老九门番外之四屠黄葵》中饰演春四 。2017年，在喜剧片《黄金女保镖》中饰演张妙彤 。
data.name: 何蓝逗

data.biography: Hà Lam Đậu là một nữ diễn viên Trung Quốc. Vào năm 2015, khi cô đang học trung học, đã tình cờ được phát hiện và bắt đầu sự nghiệp diễn xuất của mình. Nhắc đến Hà Lam Đậu, khán giả thường nghĩ ngay đến hình tượng thanh xuân vườn trường bởi dáng vẻ nhỏ nhắn và khuôn mặt đơn thuần, mộc mạc của cô nàng. Nữ diễn viên trẻ đã từng góp mặt trong nhiều bộ phim thuộc nhiều thể loại khác nhau: Bi Thương Không Thể Rơi Lệ (vai Triệu Tâm Hủy), Anh Hùng Cái Thế (vai Tần Nguyệt Nhi), Đặc Công Cùng Nhà (vai Tiểu Thước), Thanh Xuân Bỏ Đi (vai Lục Nghiên), Bạn Thân Yêu (vai Lâm Tiểu Thuần),...
data.name: Hà Lam Đậu

data.biography: 何藍逗，本名何藍，1999 年 10 月 16 日生於廣東省，中國內地女演員 。2015 年，主演青春喜劇片《青春餵了狗》，從此開始演藝事業 。2016 年 1 月，在愛情劇《翡翠戀人》中飾演逗逗 ；4 月，出演喜劇片《絕世高手》；12 月，在冒險懸疑片《老九門番外之四屠黃葵》中飾演春四 。2017 年，在喜劇片《黃金女保鏢》中飾演張妙彤 。
data.name: 何藍逗

data.biography: Raphael Thomas, a dancer, was born on St. Andrews in Jamaica. After moving to the United States, his parents enrolled him in dance classes. His pursued  training at prestigious institutions such as The Rock School of Penn. Ballet, The Kirov Academy, Dance Theatre of Harlem, New Jersey Tap Dance Ensemble, and the Austrian Ballet Company of Tokyo. Raphael majored in illustration at St. John’s University.
data.name: Raphael Thomas

data.overview: Trong cuộc so tài nấu ăn khốc liệt giữa 100 thí sinh này, 80 đầu bếp yếu thế "Thìa Đen" có sở trường về hương vị đối đầu với 20 đầu bếp ưu tú "Thìa Trắng".

data.biography: Jorma Tommila ist ein finnischer Schauspieler. Er gewann einen Jussi Award als bester Schauspieler im Jahr 1997

Jorma Tommila (Finnish pronunciation: [ˈjo̞rmɑ ˈtomːilɑ]; born 1959) is a Finnish actor. Winner of the Jussi Award for Best Actor in 1997, Tommila is best known for playing Aatami Korpi in the film Sisu (2022).

Tommila was born in Rauma, Finland and spent his youth in Kiukainen. His father died when Jorma was four years old, after suffering from injuries to his lungs in World War II. Tommila was raised by his mother, and his older sister Kielo Tommila is also an actress. He lives with his family in Vaasa. He is married to actress Ida Helander-Tommila, the sister of director Jalmari Helander. He is the father of Onni Tommila, who is also an actor.

Whilst at Helsinki Theatre Academy in 1987, Tommila was one of four founding members of God's Theater, a Finnish theater group that made experimental and radical stage art, their performances including full frontal nudity, the setting off of fire extinguishers, and the performers throwing faeces into the crowd. The four were arrested and fined, and given suspended prison sentences. They were also expelled from the college, the expulsion prompting protests from fellow students.

In 1997, Tommila won the Jussi Award for Best Actor for his role in the film The Christmas Party, directed by his God Theatre's fellow founder Jari Halonen.

Tommila's character in the film Sisu, filmed in Lapland with a budget of €6 million, has been compared with Rambo (played by Sylvester Stallone) in the 1982 film, and with John Wick (played by Keanu Reeves). He has also been described as a “new action cinema icon”. Tommila portrays Aatami Korpi, an ex-commando and gold prospector who strikes gold but has his bounty stolen by Nazi soldiers. Korpi, with courage and "unimaginable determination in the face of overwhelming odds", becomes "a one-man death squad who will go to outrageous lengths to get his gold back – even if it means killing every last Nazi in his path." For the role Tommila won the award for best actor at the Sitges Film Festival in 2022.
data.name: Jorma Tommila

data.biography:
Jorma Tommila (s. 1959) on suomalainen näyttelijä.

Tommila kuului Jumalan teatteriin, joka koostui neljästä Teatterikorkeakoulun oppilaasta. Tommilalla ja myös Jumalan teatteriin kuuluneella ohjaaja-näyttelijä Jari Halosella on ollut useita yhteisprojekteja. Tommilan ensimmäiset pitkät elokuvat olivat Jari Halosen 1990-luvulla ohjaamat Back to the USSR – takaisin Ryssiin, Lipton Cockton in the Shadows of Sodoma ja Joulubileet, joista viimeksi mainitusta hän sai pääosan Jussi-palkinnon.

2000-kymmenluvun alkupuolella Tommila esitti useissa pitkissä elokuvissa rikollista. Olli Saarelan ohjaamassa Bad Luck Lovessa Tommilan esittämä päähenkilö Ali on antisankari. Elokuvissa Raid ja Vares – yksityisetsivä Tommilan roolina on sivuosassa oleva paatunut konna.

Tommila työskentelee tällä hetkellä Vaasan kaupunginteatterin kiinnitettynä näyttelijänä.
data.name: Jorma Tommila

data.biography:
Jorma Tommila (Rauma, 1959 –) finn színész. Nemzetközileg leginkább a Sisu című 2023-as filmből ismert, Aatami Korpi szerepében.

1987 óta aktív színész, 1997-ben elnyerte a legjobb színésznek járó Jussi Awards díjat a Joulubileet című karácsonyi bűnügyi vígjátékban nyújtott alakításáért. Fia, Onni Tommila szintén színész.

Jorma Tommila（芬兰语发音：[ˈjo̞rmɑ ˈtomːilɑ]，生于1959年）是芬兰演员。托米拉于 1997 年获得尤西奖最佳男主角奖，最出名的是在电影《西苏》（2022 年）中扮演阿塔米·科尔皮。

Tommila出生于芬兰的Rauma，在Kiukainen度过了他的青年时代。他的父亲在乔玛四岁时去世，因为他的肺部在第二次世界大战中受伤。托米拉由母亲抚养长大，他的姐姐基洛·托米拉也是一名演员。他和家人住在瓦萨。他与女演员艾达·赫兰德-汤米拉（Ida Helander-Tommila）结婚，后者是导演贾尔马里·赫兰德（Jalmari Helander）的妹妹。他是Onni Tommila的父亲，他也是一名演员。

1987年在赫尔辛基戏剧学院就读期间，汤米拉是芬兰戏剧团体“上帝剧院”（God's Theatre）的四位创始成员之一，该剧院制作实验性和激进的舞台艺术，他们的表演包括正面全裸、点燃灭火器以及表演者向人群扔粪便。这四人被逮捕并处以罚款，并被判处缓刑。他们也被开除出学院，开除引发了同学的抗议。

1997 年，汤米拉因在电影《圣诞派对》中的角色而获得尤西奖最佳男主角奖，该片由他的上帝剧院的创始人贾里·哈洛宁执导。

汤米拉在拉普兰拍摄的电影《西苏》中的角色预算为600万欧元，与1982年电影中的兰博（西尔维斯特·史泰龙饰）和约翰·威克（基努·里维斯饰）进行了比较。他也被描述为“新的动作电影偶像”。托米拉饰演前突击队员和淘金者阿塔米·科尔皮，他淘金，但赏金被纳粹士兵偷走。科尔皮凭借勇气和“面对压倒性困难时难以想象的决心”，成为“一个人的敢死队，他将不遗余力地夺回他的黄金——即使这意味着杀死他路上的每一个纳粹分子。凭借这个角色，汤米拉获得了 2022 年锡切斯电影节最佳男主角奖。
data.name: 乔玛·汤米拉

data.biography:
Ο Γιόρμα Τόμιλα (Jorma Tommila) είναι Φινλανδός ηθοποιός. Κέρδισε το βραβείο Jussi Καλύτερου Ηθοποιού το 1997 και υποδύθηκε τον Aatami Korpi στην ταινία Sisu (2022).

Ο Τόμιλα γεννήθηκε στη Rauma της Φινλανδίας και πέρασε τα νιάτα του στο Kiukainen. Ο πατέρας του πέθανε όταν ο Γιόρμα ήταν τεσσάρων ετών, αφού υπέφερε από τραύματα στους πνεύμονές του απ' τον Β' Παγκόσμιο Πόλεμο. Ο Τόμιλα μεγάλωσε από τη μητέρα του και η μεγαλύτερη αδερφή του Kielo Tommila είναι επίσης ηθοποιός. Ζει με την οικογένειά του στη Βάασα. Είναι παντρεμένος με την ηθοποιό Ida Helander-Tommila, την αδερφή του σκηνοθέτη Jalmari Helander. Είναι ο πατέρας του Onni Tommila, ο οποίος είναι επίσης ηθοποιός.
data.name: Γιόρμα Τόμιλα

data.biography:
喬瑪·湯米拉（芬蘭語發音：[ˈjo̞rmɑ ˈtomːilɑ]，生於 1959 年）是芬蘭演員。託米拉於 1997 年獲得尤西獎最佳男主角獎，最出名的是在電影《西蘇》（2022 年）中扮演阿塔米·科爾皮。

Tommila 出生於芬蘭的 Rauma，在 Kiukainen 度過了他的青年時代。他的父親在喬瑪四歲時去世，因為他的肺部在第二次世界大戰中受傷。託米拉由母親撫養長大，他的姐姐基洛·託米拉也是一名演員。他和家人住在瓦薩。他與女演員艾達·赫蘭德 - 湯米拉（Ida Helander - Tommila）結婚，後者是導演賈爾馬裏·赫蘭德（Jalmari Helander）的妹妹。他是 Onni Tommila 的父親，他也是一名演員。

1987 年在赫爾辛基戲劇學院就讀期間，湯米拉是芬蘭戲劇團體“上帝劇院”（God's Theatre）的四位創始成員之一，該劇院制作實驗性和激進的舞台藝術，他們的表演包括正面全裸、點燃滅火器以及表演者向人群扔糞便。這四人被逮捕並處以罰款，並被判處緩刑。他們也被開除出學院，開除引發了同學的抗議。

1997 年，湯米拉因在電影《聖誕派對》中的角色而獲得尤西獎最佳男主角獎，該片由他的上帝劇院的創始人賈裏·哈洛寧執導。

湯米拉在拉普蘭拍攝的電影《西蘇》中的角色預算為 600 萬歐元，與 1982 年電影中的蘭博（西爾維斯特·史泰龍飾）和約翰·威克（基努·裏維斯飾）進行了比較。他也被描述為“新的動作電影偶像”。託米拉飾演前突擊隊員和淘金者阿塔米·科爾皮，他淘金，但賞金被納粹士兵偷走。科爾皮憑借勇氣和“面對壓倒性困難時難以想象的決心”，成為“一個人的敢死隊，他將不遺餘力地奪回他的黃金——即使這意味著殺死他路上的每一個納粹分子。憑借這個角色，湯米拉獲得了 2022 年錫切斯電影節最佳男主角獎。
data.name: 喬瑪·湯米拉

data.biography:
Jorma Tommila, 1959 yılında Rauma, Finlandiya'da dünyaya gelmiştir. Fin sinemasının en karakteristik ve yoğun performansa dayalı oyuncularından biri olan Tommila, kariyerine tiyatro sahnelerinde adım atmıştır. Gençlik yıllarını, 1980'lerde Finlandiya'nın tiyatro dünyasında ses getiren ve deneysel işlere imza atan God's Theatre (Jumalan teatteri) grubuyla geçirdi. Bu dönemde edindiği sahne disiplini ve bedensel anlatım yeteneği, ilerleyen yıllarda sinema kariyerinin temel taşlarını oluşturdu.

Tommila, kariyeri boyunca pek çok Fin yapımı film ve dizide rol alsa da, onu uluslararası arenada tanınır kılan asıl dönüm noktası, yönetmen Jalmari Helander ile kurduğu uzun soluklu iş birliği oldu. Bu ortaklığın ilk büyük meyvesi, kült bir statüye ulaşan 2010 yapımı fantastik korku-komedi filmi "Rare Exports: A Christmas Tale" (Rare Exports) oldu. Bu filmde canlandırdığı sert mizaçlı baba figürü Rauno, hem eleştirmenlerden hem de izleyicilerden tam not aldı.

2014 yılında, Hollywood yıldızı Samuel L. Jackson ile birlikte rol aldığı aksiyon-macera filmi "Büyük Oyun" (Big Game) ile küresel izleyici kitlesinin karşısına çıktı. Ancak Jorma Tommila'nın kariyerinde gerçek anlamda bir patlama yaratan ve onu modern aksiyon sinemasının unutulmaz karakterlerinden biri haline getiren yapım, 2022 yapımı "Sisu" oldu. İkinci Dünya Savaşı'nın son günlerinde Finlandiya'nın vahşi doğasında Nazilere karşı tek başına mücadele eden efsanevi eski asker Aatami Korpi'yi canlandırdığı bu film, dünya çapında büyük bir başarı yakaladı. Tommila'nın film boyunca neredeyse hiç konuşmadan, sadece fiziksel performansı, delici bakışları ve karizmasıyla sergilediği oyunculuk, ona "ölümsüz" bir aksiyon kahramanı statüsü kazandırdı ve birçok uluslararası festivalden ödülle dönmesini sağladı.

Kişisel hayatında da sanatsal bir çevreye sahip olan Jorma Tommila, yönetmen Jalmari Helander'in kayınbiraderidir. Ayrıca, "Rare Exports", "Big Game" ve "Sisu" gibi en önemli projelerinde, kendi oğlu olan genç yetenek Onni Tommila ile birlikte kamera karşısına geçmiştir. Tommila, az diyalogla çok şey anlatan oyunculuk tarzı ve sert kuzeyli duruşuyla Fin sinemasının en önemli ihracatlarından biri olarak kabul edilmektedir.
Liang Guo Rang is an actor in Mainland China.
data.name: Liang Guorong

data.biography: Emily Tennant is a Canadian actress. She played Ivy Young on the Canadian comedy television series Mr. Young, and voices Polly Pocket in the eponymous animated series.
data.name: Emily Tennant

data.biography:
Emily Tennant (* 9. August 1990 in Vancouver, British Columbia) ist eine kanadische Schauspielerin. Sie ist bekannt für ihre Rolle als Ivy Young in Mr. Young sowie als Sarah in Triple Dog. Sie ist auch unter ihrem Künstlernamen Emily Tenant bekannt.

Emily Tennant wurde im August 1990 im kanadischen Vancouver geboren und wuchs in der Vorstadt auf. Sie sammelte schon in jungen Jahren Schauspielerfahrung bei Werbefilmen. 2000 spielte sie ihre erste Rolle in der romantischen Komödie Single-Alarm – Unser Vater braucht ’ne Frau!. Seitdem ist sie in mehreren kleinen Rollen zu sehen. 2004 spielte sie eine wiederkehrende Rolle in der Comedy-Horror-Serie Kingdom Hospital. Sie war 2009 im Weihnachtsfilm Christmas in Canaan, sowie in dessen Fortsetzung Christmas Comes Home to Canaan aus dem Jahr 2011 zu sehen. 2009 gewann Tennant einen Leo Award in der Kategorie Beste Schauspielerin in einem Kurzfilm (Best Performance by a Female in a Short Drama) für ihre Arbeit in Valentines. Von 2011 bis 2013 übernahm sie eine Hauptrolle als Adams Schwester Ivy in der kanadischen Jugendserie Mr. Young. Seitdem hatte sie mehrere Gastauftritte in Fernsehserien.

Emily Tennant wurde im August 1990 im kanadischen Vancouver geboren und wuchs in der Vorstadt auf. Sie sammelte schon in jungen Jahren Schauspielerfahrung bei Werbefilmen. 2000 spielte sie ihre erste Rolle in der romantischen Komödie Single-Alarm – Unser Vater braucht ’ne Frau!. Seitdem ist sie in mehreren kleinen Rollen zu sehen. 2004 spielte sie eine wiederkehrende Rolle in der Comedy-Horror-Serie Kingdom Hospital. Sie war 2009 im Weihnachtsfilm Christmas in Canaan, sowie in dessen Fortsetzung Christmas Comes Home to Canaan aus dem Jahr 2011 zu sehen. 2009 gewann Tennant einen Leo Award in der Kategorie Beste Schauspielerin in einem Kurzfilm (Best Performance by a Female in a Short Drama) für ihre Arbeit in Valentines. Von 2011 bis 2013 übernahm sie eine Hauptrolle als Adams Schwester Ivy in der kanadischen Jugendserie Mr. Young. Seitdem hatte sie mehrere Gastauftritte in Fernsehserien.
艾米莉·坦南特（Emily Tennant，1990 年 8 月 9 日出生）是一位加拿大女演员
data.name: 艾米莉·坦南特

data.biography: 艾米莉·坦南特（Emily Tennant，1990 年 8 月 9 日出生）是一位加拿大女演員
data.name: 艾米莉·坦南特
